content:
# Final Review Votes
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-7-max

## Summary

Verified fr-1-aa4fe55a independently: the test `pre_commit_failure_remediation_survives_resume` exists at tests/unit/workflow_engine_test.rs:8809 and fails with the exact `ResumeFailed { reason: "stage review failed: remediation exhausted at cycle 4; maximum supported cycles is 3" }` message quoted in the amendment. The cited engine.rs regions (4505-4623 pre-commit gate/cycle-advance, 8417-8583 resume context derivation including derive_remediation_from_pre_commit_evidence) are accurate. The bug reproduces on master as well, confirming it is pre-existing and not introduced by this comment-only bead, but it is a real correctness/recoverability defect. Per the instructions, scope is not a rejection basis for a real bug.

## Votes

- `fr-1-aa4fe55a`: Accept
  Reproducible regression verified end-to-end. The test at tests/unit/workflow_engine_test.rs:8809-8929 fails with the exact error text quoted at line 8917. The cited engine.rs regions (pre-commit gate at 4505-4623, resume reconstruction at 8417-8583 including derive_remediation_from_pre_commit_evidence) match the described remediation-cycle advance/resume logic. Resume after a pre-commit failure cannot complete even after the underlying formatting issue is fixed, leaving real runs unrecoverable — a genuine correctness/safety defect. Per instructions, out-of-scope-relative-to-the-bead is not grounds for rejection, and the issue exists on master regardless of this comment-only branch, so surfacing it is legitimate.
